LandingPage.title: Premium travel execution, from readiness to recovery.
LandingPage.description: Keep every reservation, handoff, and disruption response in one adaptive workflow designed to prevent misses and reduce travel stress.
LandingPage.subtext: Mobile-first, dark-mode compatible, and built for live trip operations.

TripOrientationCard.snapshotTitle: Trip snapshot: where you are + what is next

ReservationList.title: Reservation cards
ReservationList.subtitle: Structured reservations with detail drawers, assignment controls, and operational quick actions.

ReviewQueue.title: Intake review queue
ReviewQueue.subtitle: Handle uncertain imports before they affect the active itinerary.
ReviewQueue.importSubtitle: Look for confirmation emails and turn them into trip cards.
ReviewQueue.proNote: Gmail reservation import is available on Pro.
ReviewQueue.queueClear: Review queue clear. No unresolved import ambiguity.

DisruptionRecovery.hiddenMessage: Recovery playbook is hidden by current focus or mobile view selection.
DisruptionRecovery.title: Missed-flight / disruption recovery panel
DisruptionRecovery.subtitle: Who to call, what to say, and decision path guidance by urgency level.
DisruptionRecovery.autopilotSubtitle: One-tap remediation plan based on live trip risk, queue pressure, sync state, and worker health.
DisruptionRecovery.autopilotClear: Autopilot sees no immediate incidents requiring intervention.

OpsPanel.hidden: Ops panel hidden in focus mode for this stage.
OpsPanel.title: Ops observability panel
OpsPanel.noBackgroundRun: No background run recorded yet. Trigger /api/travel-updates/background to verify worker path.
OpsPanel.noGreenBlockers: No local blockers. Green can be granted.

QuickAddLane.desktopPlaceholder: Universal quick add: paste email line or type a manual update
QuickAddLane.mobilePlaceholder: Quick add: paste or type one update
QuickAddLane.autoRoutedNote: Low-confidence quick adds are automatically routed to review queue before live itinerary.
QuickAddLane.simpleModeNote: Simple mode keeps only key actions visible on phone.

OnboardingFlow.welcomeDescription: Kepi is your personal travel execution assistant. It watches your flights, tracks your bookings, and tells you exactly what to do and when — so nothing slips through the cracks.
OnboardingFlow.welcomeBulletOne: Alerts before things go wrong — gate changes, delays, tight connections.
OnboardingFlow.welcomeBulletTwo: Smart guidance: when to leave, what to pack, how to clear customs fast.
OnboardingFlow.welcomeBulletThree: Forward any booking confirmation email and Kepi does the rest.
OnboardingFlow.referralCodeHint: Enter a friend referral code to unlock free Pro trial days.
OnboardingFlow.referralCodePrefilled: Referral code prefilled from your invite link.
OnboardingFlow.referralCodeRedeemed: Referral code redeemed. {days} free Pro days added.
OnboardingFlow.referralCodeAlreadyRedeemed: Referral already applied to this account.
OnboardingFlow.referralCodeInvalid: That referral code is invalid. Please verify and retry.
OnboardingFlow.notificationsDescription: Allow notifications so Kepi can alert you when gates change, flights delay, or it's time to leave for the airport.
OnboardingFlow.notificationsUnsupported: Notifications are not supported in this browser.
OnboardingFlow.notificationsEnabled: Notifications enabled. You will receive delay and gate alerts.
OnboardingFlow.notificationsDenied: Notification permission denied. You can enable it later in browser settings.
OnboardingFlow.notificationsDismissed: Notification permission dismissed. You can retry any time.
OnboardingFlow.gmailDescription: Import reservations automatically from Gmail to reduce manual entry.
OnboardingFlow.gmailFallbackMessage: Gmail connection is not fully configured yet ({status}).
OnboardingFlow.gmailConnected: Gmail connected. Reservation import is available.
OnboardingFlow.gmailUnavailable: Could not reach Gmail import service right now. You can connect later.
OnboardingFlow.doneDescription: Your trip is set up and Kepi is watching. Forward any booking confirmation email to your Kepi address and it will appear automatically.
OnboardingFlow.doneHint: Tap Start to open your trip dashboard.

ReferralLandingPage.title: Your friend invited you to Kepi
ReferralLandingPage.subtitle: Start with adaptive trip execution, anti-miss safeguards, and premium logistics workflows built for real travel days.
ReferralLandingPage.featureOne: Live disruption playbooks for flights, trains, and rides.
ReferralLandingPage.featureTwo: Adaptive stage views from readiness through recovery.
ReferralLandingPage.featureThree: One-tap quick capture with review safeguards.
ReferralLandingPage.featureFour: Pro features for Gmail import, AI guidance, and smart alerts.
ReferralLandingPage.ctaHint: Your referral code will be prefilled during onboarding.

UpgradeModal.subtitle: This workflow is part of Pro so advanced logistics tools stay available when you need them most.
UpgradeModal.benefitTwo: Gmail import and proactive AI itinerary guidance
UpgradeModal.benefitThree: Push alerts for critical gate and delay updates

SharePage.invalidMessage: This itinerary share link is invalid or no longer available.
SharePage.expiredMessage: This link has expired. Ask your travel organizer to generate a new one.
SharePage.revokedMessage: This link was revoked by the trip owner and can no longer be used.
SharePage.noReservations: No reservations shared for this trip yet.
